episodes.title: The Waco Siege Redux
episodes.description: In this episode, 65, Richard and Bryan decided to revisit episode 2 of the TJI podcast, The Waco Siege. It is a story that lives on and had all the elements of high drama, sex, guns, law enforcement, cults, and news coverage that didn't quit for weeks. Richard Ray was there and gives us his first person view of the situation. The podcast rewind will continue in the upcoming weeks with "The Fiery End" and "Untold Stories". Episode 65 is sure to reach a wider audience. Comments are always welcome. You can find the TJI podcast on Spotify, Apple Podcasts, and YouTube (http://bit.ly/4fD6UsH)
